title: GraalJS
body:
This mod packages GraalJS to facilitate other mods using GraalJS without needing to package it separately.

Version number explanation: GraalJS-(Supported Minecraft version)-(GraalJS version)-(This mod version number)-(Mod loader identifier)-(Packaging type)  
For example: GraalJS-1.21.x-24.2.1-1-Neo-lite

GraalJS: https://www.graalvm.org/javascript/  
GraalJS Documentation: https://www.graalvm.org/reference-manual/js/  
This project's GitHub: https://github.com/An-Mao/MC-GraalJS

----Attention----  
· This is not an official GraalVM product. If you encounter non-code related issues, please contact me.  
· When starting the game with a JDK that includes GraalJS (such as GraalVM), errors may occur. Please use the lite version in the attached files.


Any questions can be asked in github or contacted as below:  
- [Telegram](https://url.anye.dev/tg)
- [Discord](https://url.anye.dev/discord)
